message:
feat(command,conformance): add GEORADIUS_RO, GEORADIUSBYMEMBER_RO, SYNC

- Add GEORADIUS_RO (12 chars) and GEORADIUSBYMEMBER_RO (20 chars) as
  read-only variants sharing the same handlers as their write counterparts
- Add SYNC to COMMAND_TABLE (handled by runtime as PSYNC alias)
- Handle RespFrame::Sequence in conformance frame_matches_expected
- Update command_count fixtures to use any_integer (count grows as
  commands are added)

Reduces missing command count from 10 to 7 (remaining: FAILOVER,
MIGRATE, MODULE, MONITOR, SENTINEL, PFDEBUG, PFSELFTEST).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
